name: ShCh-214
events: 3 Nov 1941 ShCh-214 sank the Turkish sailing vessel Kaynakdere (85 GRT) with gunfire south-east of Cape Igneada, Turkey in position 41°45'N, 28°16'E.
4 Nov 1941 ShCh-214 fires a torpedo against ' what is identified as ' a merchant of 4000 GRT off Cape Servi, Turkey. The torpedo however missed it's target.
5 Nov 1941 ShCh-214 torpedoed and sank the Italian tanker Torcello (3336 GRT) east of Cape Igneada, Turkey in position 41°53'N, 28°22'E.
1 Jan 1942 ShCh-214 sank the Turkish sailing vessel Koraltepe (209 GRT) with gunfire east of Cape Igneada, Turkey in position 41°43'N, 28°15'E.
29 May 1942 ShCh-214 sank the Turkish sailing vessel Hudavendigar (90 GRT) through ramming east-south-east of Cape Igneada, Turkey in position 41°50'N, 28°14'E
31 May 1942 ShCh-214 sank the Turkish sailing vessel Mahbubdihan (85 GRT) with gunfire east-north-east of Cape Igneada, Turkey in position 41°55'N, 28°15'E
2 Jun 1942 ShCh-214 sank the Turkish sailing vessel Kaynarea through ramming east of Rezovo, Bulgaria (on the Bulgian-Turkish border) in position 42°00'N, 28°16'E
